author.bio: @golang Product Lead @Google • Previously VP @Docker & @MongoDB, @Drupal board • creator of @gohugoio, Cobra, Viper & spf13-vim • Father of 4
author.name: Steve Francia

content.text: Today is my 1 year Google-versary 🎆🍰🤘What a year! I knew I was joining a great project but didn't realize I was joining a family. #golang 🤗
